text:
There once was a dog named Woody. Woody lived in a small cabin in a forest clearing. He had a favorite sleeping spot on the hearthstone, right by the crackling fireplace. Woody liked to nap but always woke up just in time for his breakfast.

One autumn morning, as Woody was munching on his kibble, he smelled something strange. It wasn't something he’d had before. Curious, he followed the aroma outside. It led him to a peculiar-looking pile of leaves.

This wasn’t your ordinary pile of leaves. It was glowing softly—a soft orange hue. Woody sat down near the leaves, sniffing cautiously. It smelled like sweet firewood.

Then, as if on cue, a small fairy hovered out of nowhere. She giggled and beckoned Woody.

Woody blinked in surprise. "Hey there!" the fairy said. "I’m Fanny. Would you like some magic berries?"

Woody nibbled one. "Hmm," he chewed contempl
